content: Route the gap per evolve-colony step 1: this is not a new command, not a new sub-agent, and not a new domain -- it's a behavioral/schema hardening of two existing Platform engine skills (orchestrator, checker) plus the shared trail-schema reference. Flag that agent-router's three shapes (command/sub-agent/domain) don't cleanly cover 'harden an existing platform skill's contract' -- note this as a routing-scheme gap for Reflector, do not force-fit.

cto architecture review: determine whether dependency-resolver's resolution output should become an explicit, checkable trail artifact instead of an implicit step orchestrator is merely instructed to perform. Success condition: a concrete recommendation (new 00-deps.jsonl file vs. embedding resolution result in 00-frame.json) with a stated reason.

clo domain-boundary check: confirm the proposed change only touches catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/ (orchestrator-role, checker-role, trail-schema.md), not any domain's own SKILL.md, and therefore doesn't cross Law 4. Success condition: explicit pass/fail against Law 4 with the specific paths checked.

skill-creator packaging (staged, not applied): draft the concrete diffs -- trail-schema.md gains a 00-deps.jsonl entry in the directory layout; orchestrator-role/SKILL.md step 1 is amended to require writing that file; checker-role/SKILL.md gains a new check ('dependency-resolution-recorded') that fails the cycle if 00-deps.jsonl is missing or doesn't match what step 3 (Plan->Make->Check->Reflect) actually dispatched. Success condition: a single staging file inside this trail containing all three diffs verbatim, with nothing written to the live files themselves (that write is TYPE1 -- catalog/ -- and belongs to /ceo:approve-initiative, not this cycle).

Separately record, as an out-of-scope finding (not actioned this cycle): two stale 'sibling pmcro-skills repo' references survive in catalog/Tools/AI-Company/skills/cto/skills/domain-scope/SKILL.md and catalog/Tools/AI-Company/skills/ceo/commands/evolve-colony.md (step 2, skill-creator bullet). These are the same class of staleness already fixed in README.md/AGENTS.md/COLONY.md/Law 2 in the prior session, just not caught in that pass. Flagging per Law 4 (don't silently absorb work outside this cycle's stated true_intent) rather than fixing inline.
